title: 'Sonar Bangla' Roadmap: BJP Unveils 15-Point Manifesto For 2026 West Bengal Polls
description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah officially launched the BJP’s "Sankalp Patra" for the 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections, framing it as a roadmap to "Sonar Bangla." The 15-point manifesto focuses on national security through a "detect, delete, and deport" infiltration policy, economic growth via the creation of 1 crore jobs, and women’s empowerment through 33% job reservation and the "Durga Suraksha Sahaya" scheme.
